title: Evangelion Cover Art
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion Cover Art             Quote Post by scarmullet » Sun Aug 23, 2009 2:12 am Those of you who own multiple releases or have owned multiple releases, what is your favorite cover art from any release you may have owned or seen. I like this one from the Laserdisc 0:12 Disc featuring episodes Directors Cut 23 and 24.

[]:             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Sun Aug 23, 2009 8:18 pm I like most of the covers to the platinum addition volumes.
